mapper.sql: id, run_id, job_type, status, evidence_packet_id, rule_registry_id, judge_schema_version, analyzer_version, prompt_version, CAST(model_info_jsonb AS TEXT) AS model_info_jsonb, CAST(output_jsonb AS TEXT) AS output_jsonb, friction_score, created_at, started_at, finished_at, error_code, error_message
mapper.select: SELECT FROM analysis_job WHERE run_id = #{runId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO analysis_job ( id, run_id, job_type, status, rule_registry_id, judge_schema_version, analyzer_version, prompt_version, model_info_jsonb, output_jsonb, friction_score, finished_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{runId}, COALESCE(#{jobType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'PRIMARY'), #{status}, #{ruleRegistryId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{judgeSchemaVersion}, #{analyzerVersion}, #{promptVersion}, CAST(#{modelInfoJsonb} AS jsonb), CAST(#{outputJsonb} AS jsonb), #{frictionScore}, #{finishedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET run_id = EXCLUDED.run_id, job_type = EXCLUDED.job_type, status = EXCLUDED.status, rule_registry_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.rule_registry_id, analysis_job.rule_registry_id), judge_schema_version = EXCLUDED.judge_schema_version, analyzer_version = EXCLUDED.analyzer_version, prompt_version = EXCLUDED.prompt_version, model_info_jsonb = EXCLUDED.model_info_jsonb, output_jsonb = EXCLUDED.output_jsonb, friction_score = EXCLUDED.friction_score, finished_at = EXCLUDED.finished_at, error_code = NULL, error_message = NULL

INSERT INTO analysis_job ( id, run_id, job_type, status, finished_at, error_code, error_message ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{runId}, COALESCE(#{jobType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'PRIMARY'), #{status}, #{finishedAt}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage} ) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET run_id = EXCLUDED.run_id, job_type = EXCLUDED.job_type, status = EXCLUDED.status, finished_at = EXCLUDED.finished_at, error_code = EXCLUDED.error_code, error_message = EXCLUDED.error_message
